description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Burned</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>火傷</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> 확률로 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>화상</color>을 부여합니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>烧伤</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Burned</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>火傷</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> 확률로 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>화상</color>을 부여합니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>烧伤</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks all enemies.\nDeals increased damage if the target is inflicted with <color=#28d9ed>Burned</color>.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与える。\n対象が<color=#28d9ed>火傷</color>状態の場合、ダメージがUPする。
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격합니다.\n대상이 <color=#28d9ed>화상</color> 상태라면 피해가 증가합니다.
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人。\n若目标处于<color=#28d9ed>烧伤</color>状态,则伤害提升。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nIncreases Speed by <color=#28d9ed>12.5%</color> every time the caster takes a turn. (Max 5 stacks)
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n自分のターンが来るたびに、スピードが<color=#28d9ed>12.5%</color>UPする。(最大5回まで累積)
description.zh: (被动效果)\n每到自身回合时,使速度提升<color=#28d9ed>12.5%</color>。(最多可叠加5次)

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nRecovers <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> of damage dealt as Health when attacking.\nIncreases <color=#28d9ed>Attack</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color> at the start of battle.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n攻撃時、ダメージの<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>を回復する。\n戦闘開始時、<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力</color>が<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間UPする。
description.kr: (패시브 효과)\n공격 시 피해량의 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>를 회복합니다.\n전투 시작 시 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>공격력</color>이 증가합니다.
description.zh: (被动效果)\n攻击时,恢复伤害量的<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>。\n战斗开始时,使<color=#28d9ed>攻击力</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。
